_comment: Remote firmware manifest. Update this file to publish new firmware URLs without requiring an app update. Community contributions welcome — submit a PR.

bf-f8hp-pro.release_notes: V0.53: smarter scanning, better airband, more control (NRF hardware)

bf-f8hp-pro-nrfb.release_notes: V0.53: smarter scanning, better airband, more control (NRFB hardware)

uv-25-pro.release_notes: V0.20: fixed GPS radar distance display after location sharing

rt-470.release_notes: V2.13C: AM/FM modulation switch 18MHz-1000MHz, 8.33kHz air band (470X/470/470L, new PCB)

rt-490-new.release_notes: V1.25a: new PCB, channel name editing
